de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Class KeYTypeUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.KeYTypeUtil

  • public final class KeYTypeUtil
extends Object
    Provides utility methods which makes it easier to analyze the type hierarchy of KeYJavaType instances with help of given Services.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String PACKAGE_SEPARATOR
      Separator between packages and types.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private KeYTypeUtil()
      Forbid instances.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static IProgramMethod findExplicitConstructor(Services services, IProgramMethod implicitConstructor)
      Returns the IProgramMethod of the explicit constructor for the given implicit constructor.
      static String getParentName(Services services, KeYJavaType type)
      Returns the name of the parent package/type or null if it has no one.
      private static String getParentName(Services services, String fullName)
      Returns the name of the parent package/type or null if it has no one.
      static KeYJavaType getType(Services services, String fullName)
      Returns the KeYJavaType fore the given name.
      static boolean isImplicitConstructor(IProgramMethod pm)
      Checks if the given IProgramMethod is an implicit constructor.
      static boolean isInnerType(Services services, KeYJavaType type)
      Checks if the given type is an inner or anonymous type.
      static boolean isLibraryClass(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Checks if the given KeYJavaType is a library class.
      static boolean isType(Services services, String fullName)
      Checks if the given full name is a type in KeY.
      static String resolveType(ParameterDeclaration parameterDeclaration)
      Resolves the type of the given ParameterDeclaration.
      static String resolveType(Type type)
      Resolves the type of the given Type.
      static String resolveType(TypeReference typeReference)
      Resolves the type of the given TypeReference.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • PACKAGE_SEPARATOR

        public static final String PACKAGE_SEPARATOR
        Separator between packages and types.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Constructor Detail

      • KeYTypeUtil

        private KeYTypeUtil()
        Forbid instances.

    • Method Detail

      • isInnerType

        public static boolean isInnerType(Services services,
                  KeYJavaType type)
        Checks if the given type is an inner or anonymous type.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        type - The type to check.
        Returns:
        true is inner or anonymous, false is not

      • getParentName

        public static String getParentName(Services services,
                   KeYJavaType type)
        Returns the name of the parent package/type or null if it has no one.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        type - The type.
        Returns:
        The parent package/type or null if it has no one.

      • getParentName

        private static String getParentName(Services services,
                   String fullName)
        Returns the name of the parent package/type or null if it has no one.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        fullName - The name of the current package/type.
        Returns:
        The parent package/type or null if it has no one.

      • isType

        public static boolean isType(Services services,
             String fullName)
        Checks if the given full name is a type in KeY.
        Parameters:
        services - The services to use.
        fullName - The full name to check.
        Returns:
        true = is type, false = is no type

      • getType

        public static KeYJavaType getType(Services services,
                  String fullName)
        Returns the KeYJavaType fore the given name.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        fullName - The full name of the requested KeYJavaType.
        Returns:
        The found KeYJavaType or null if no type exist with the given name.

      • isLibraryClass

        public static boolean isLibraryClass(KeYJavaType kjt)
        Checks if the given KeYJavaType is a library class.
        Parameters:
        kjt - The KeYJavaType to check.
        Returns:
        true is library class, false is no library class.

      • isImplicitConstructor

        public static boolean isImplicitConstructor(IProgramMethod pm)
        Checks if the given IProgramMethod is an implicit constructor.
        Parameters:
        pm - The IProgramMethod to check.
        Returns:
        true is implicit constructor, false is no implicit constructor (e.g. method or explicit construcotr).

      • findExplicitConstructor

        public static IProgramMethod findExplicitConstructor(Services services,
                                     IProgramMethod implicitConstructor)
        Returns the IProgramMethod of the explicit constructor for the given implicit constructor.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        implicitConstructor - The implicit constructor.
        Returns:
        The found explicit constructor or null if not available.

      • resolveType

        public static String resolveType(ParameterDeclaration parameterDeclaration)
        Resolves the type of the given ParameterDeclaration.
        Parameters:
        parameterDeclaration - The ParameterDeclaration to resolve.
        Returns:
        The full qualified type name or null if the given ParameterDeclaration is null.

      • resolveType

        public static String resolveType(TypeReference typeReference)
        Resolves the type of the given TypeReference.
        Parameters:
        typeReference - The TypeReference to resolve.
        Returns:
        The full qualified type name or null if the given TypeReference is null.

      • resolveType

        public static String resolveType(Type type)
        Resolves the type of the given Type.
        Parameters:
        type - The Type to resolve.
        Returns:
        The full qualified type name or null if the given Type is null.
